protein_name: Mitochondrial GTPase involved in mitochondrial trafficking. Probably involved in control of anterograde transport of mitochondria and their subcellular distribution. Promotes mitochondrial fission during high calcium conditions. Interacts with the kinesin-binding proteins TRAK1/OIP106 and TRAK2/GRIF1, forming a link between mitochondria and the trafficking apparatus of the microtubules. Interacts with RAP1GDS1. Interacts with ARMCX1. Found in a complex with KIF5B, OGT, RHOT2 and TRAK1. 7 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
